sheet_name: แบบขยายรั้วแบบที่ 1

element.description: Fence column C1 — reinforced concrete post between fence bays
element.cap: F (post cap, detail not separately dimensioned)

element.description: Ground beam (คานคอดิน) tying fence columns together at grade

element.picket_spec: เหล็ก Ø3/4"x3/4" LG. ปลายตัด 45 องศา @15ซม (3/4in x 3/4in square steel tube pickets, ends cut 45°, spaced @150mm)

element.description: Pile foundation under each fence column
element.pile_spec: เสาเข็ม 2-0.15x0.15x4.00ม (2 precast concrete piles, 150x150mm section, 4.00m long, per column)
element.dowel: DOWEL Ø12 ยาว 1.00ม เทคอนกรีตยึดกับเสาเข็ม (12mm dowel bar, 1.00m long, cast to bond pile cap to pile)
element.lean_concrete: คอนกรีตหยาบ (lean/blinding concrete at base)

warnings: Sheet A-14 shows one fence design (Type 1) across plan (แปลน), front elevation (รูปด้านหน้า), column detail (ขยายเสา C1), ground beam detail (ขยายคานคอดิน GB), and section (รูปตัด) — kept as one file since it's a single fence type, not multiple distinct instances.

Although this is on an architectural sheet (A-08 to A-15 series), the fence contains genuine reinforced-concrete structural elements (column C1, ground beam GB, pile foundation) with legible rebar callouts — these are transcribed directly from clear printed text, so confidence is higher than most other pages in this range.

The overall vertical dimension chain on the front elevation (left margin: 2.00 / 1.35 / 0.90 / 0.40 / 0.30 / 0.10 / 0.10 / 0.20) was not fully decomposed into a single unambiguous zone-by-zone breakdown — treat the standalone overall_height_mm (2000mm fence height above grade) as the reliable figure and the full stack as needing zoom verification if finer breakdown is required.
Property-line offset note 'แนวเขตที่ดิน' with a 0.15m dimension appears in the section — the column sits approximately 150mm from the property line, per that callout.

See sibling file บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า17.json (A-15, Fence Type 2) for the alternate fence design, which reuses the same column C1 and ground beam GB specs but a different infill (concrete block panel instead of steel pickets).
